steps.title: Distribute the negative sign
steps.content:
The negative sign in front of the second group changes the signs of both terms within it:
$$(2x + 3) - (x - 7) = 2x + 3 - x + 7$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Group the $x$ terms and constants separately, then simplify:
$$(2x - x) + (3 + 7)$$
$$x + 10$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
